description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 3 hrs 55 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 23 mins. His coding was split across 3 projects, and the most-used languages were Java, Other, and Markdown. He did not record any GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
